{{Quote|Let's take it right to their home.|Rojo during the Second Battle of Helska|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref>}}
'''Warshack Rojo''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] officer in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. He was an intense but confident man with a shaven scalp and a diamond earring in one ear, and in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he commanded the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Rejuvenator]]'' and led a task force based out of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].

He was killed in the [[Battle of Helska IV]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], when the ''Rejuvenator'' was shot down by a massive fleet of [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}
